scope: Viewport surface reconstruction only. The Wave/Bump layer appearance does not alter geometry and is not a slicer or G-code toolpath.

browserHelperWire.role: Editable curve guide retained by the GN-VM viewport; excluded from mesh topology counts.

capture.lightScaleInterpretation: Blender Area energy and Three.js RectAreaLight intensity are renderer-specific units. The browser uses direct Standard-like output for this high-chroma filament instead of ACES desaturation.

recoveredGraph.color: POINT-domain col attribute written from the Filament Color modifier input
recoveredGraph.frontColor: Blender Mix Color COLOR branch; both HSV inputs share hue and saturation, so the authored front color remains col
recoveredGraph.backColor: Geometry Backfacing selects the achromatic secondary branch

interpretation: The shared portable filament implementation renders the complete topology-exact Clevis Pin without asset-specific shader code. Silhouette alignment is near-identical and large-scale luminance structure correlates strongly. Blender's Medium High Contrast look clips the yellow-green surface more aggressively, while derivative bump filtering and the retained browser guide wire remain raster residuals; pixel identity is not claimed.
